text:
There wasn't much snow. It barely melted.

My brother thought he could walk. We went down.

He wasn't careful. He fell.

We found him crying, snow.

I went home. I slept. You didn't sleep.



Would you do it again?

You just think they could take you.

I don't think they'd.

We got you a gun.



You kill that guy.

I don't think.

We fight.

You're good. Why not kill that?

Because I'd do something terrible.

Maybe shoot somewhere.

No. Why would I shoot? I don't wanna die. That's dumb.

No. I'd have.

Why'd you choose?

Because I would.

You think?

One good thing? I don't think I'd remember it.

I'll remember.

Do I look mad?

Oh.


Never cared.

We'd just walk.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
